matches.summary: Sony has released its full-year financial results, reporting stable sales and a modest increase in operating income for its Games & Network Services segment (G&NS).

matches.summary: Nintendo has published its full year financial results, reporting substantial growth in net sales and profits following the first fiscal year of the Switch 2.
matches.title: Nintendo FY sales soar 98.6% to $14.6bn following launch of Switch 2

matches.summary: Unity has published its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, with overall revenue rising 17% to $508 million, up from $435 million during the same quarter last year.
matches.title: Unity Q1 revenue rises 17%, posts $347m loss following IronSource closure
